EmailTemplate.name: LoR Notice 2 Content
EmailTemplate.subject: Security Letter of Release Exercise Rights - Estate No. : {!insolv.EstateNumber}, Account No. : {!Insolvency_Account__c.Secured_Name__c}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Canaccede is sending this notice since we have not received the Security Letter of Release or acknowledgement of previous communication.
Dear Sir/Madam.
As you are aware, {!pocPackage.CFG_Office_Name} is processing {!pocPackage.Client_Company_Name} insolvent accounts.
Our records show that we have sent a proof of claim and a request for the release of security and have not received a response. As such please see the attached letter from {!pocPackage.Client_Company_Name} for more information.
Sincerely
{!pocPackage.CFG_Office_Name}
P:{!pocPackage.CFG_Office_Phone_Number__c} E: {!pocPackage.CFG_Office_Email_Address__c}
